login.title: LokSetu Secure Voting System
login.instruction: Verify your identity with face recognition to access the secure blockchain ballot.
login.step1Desc: Remove masks or glasses. Ensure proper lighting.
login.step2Desc: Look at the camera and blink to prove liveness.
login.step3Desc: Once verified, you'll be redirected to vote.
login.notFoundMessage: Identity not found. Contact an administrator.

vote.selectCandidate: Select your candidate below and submit your vote securely.
vote.selectToVote: Select a candidate to cast your vote
vote.confirmWarning: This action cannot be undone. Your vote will be recorded on the blockchain.
vote.thankYou: Thank you for participating in the democratic process.
vote.errorDesc: There was a problem casting your vote. Please try again.
